title: phryma leptostachya subsp. asiatica
intro: Phryma leptostachya subsp. asiatica, also known as Asiatic Marsh Candlesmoke or Chinese Phryma, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Phryma leptostachya subsp. asiatica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
